since_last: 30% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.64%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.89% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 30% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.64%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.64%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LSCC is the standout at -6.03%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +3.49%, PUBM +2.43%, SAP +1.15%, PLTR +1.10%, NOW +1.08%. Laggards: LSCC -6.03%, MU -5.18%, MRVL -4.56%, ARM -4.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.32% at $150.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
